summary: KYC page in-app browser detection and camera button visibility tested - All features working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: KYC in-app browser detection verified. Test detection logic for FBAN, Instagram, WhatsApp patterns confirmed working. Camera buttons only show on mobile non-in-app browsers. Desktop shows 'Choose File' only.

verified_features.1_kyc_desktop_view: PASS - Desktop shows 'Choose File' button only, no camera buttons
verified_features.3_inapp_detection_facebook: PASS - FBAN/FBAV patterns correctly detected as in-app browser
verified_features.4_inapp_detection_instagram: PASS - Instagram pattern correctly detected as in-app browser
verified_features.5_inapp_detection_whatsapp: PASS - WhatsApp pattern correctly detected as in-app browser
verified_features.6_inapp_warning_component: PASS - InAppBrowserWarning component exists with data-testid='inapp-browser-warning'
verified_features.7_copy_link_button: PASS - Copy Link button exists with data-testid='copy-link-btn'
verified_features.8_normal_mobile_browser: PASS - Chrome Mobile and Safari iOS correctly NOT detected as in-app
verified_features.9_kyc_step1_document_selection: PASS - Passport, ID Card, Driver's License options visible
verified_features.10_kyc_step2_upload_area: PASS - Upload area with correct buttons based on device type
verified_features.11_kyc_step3_video_selfie: PASS - Video Selfie section with Start Video button (data-testid='start-video-btn')
verified_features.12_kyc_step3_address_proof: PASS - Proof of Address section with Choose File button
verified_features.13_login_flow: PASS - Login with admin@blockchain.com / admin123 works correctly
verified_features.14_registration_flow: PASS - New user registration works, redirects to wallet dashboard
verified_features.15_en_translations: PASS - English in-app browser translations present in i18n.js (Lines 81-83)
verified_features.16_it_translations: PASS - Italian in-app browser translations present in i18n.js (Lines 148-149)

code_verification.detectInAppBrowser_function: Lines 18-39 in KYCPage.js - Detects FBAN, Instagram, WhatsApp, Telegram, WeChat, etc.
code_verification.isInAppBrowser_variable: Line 42 in KYCPage.js - const isInAppBrowser = detectInAppBrowser()
code_verification.InAppBrowserWarning_component: Lines 45-108 in KYCPage.js - Full-screen warning with instructions and Copy Link button
code_verification.canUseCamera_logic: Line 497 in KYCPage.js - const canUseCamera = isMobile && !isInAppBrowser
